briefing_text:
SAGE Morning Briefing — Friday, May 01 2026
Business: Marathon Deli

Health Score: 72/100
6 recommendations | $10,981 total impact

Top actions:
  [SHELF] Negotiate direct delivery for orders >$25 or push Marathon app ($4,368)
  [PULSE] Revenue Anomaly Detected ($4,009)
  [SHELF] Hire part-time evening cashier to absorb 4-6h/week OT ($924)

recommendations.title: Negotiate direct delivery for orders >$25 or push Marathon app
recommendations.description: DoorDash Marketplace Commission — 30% commission on delivery revenue (~13% of total)

recommendations.title: Hire part-time evening cashier to absorb 4-6h/week OT
recommendations.description: Overtime Labor — Michael Rivera (7h OT this week) — Supervisor working 47h this week (7h above threshold)

recommendations.title: Hold gyro at $13.50 — emphasize portion size and local brand
Marathon's differentiation is quality/variety — no need to match
Current pricing favorable — maintain
recommendations.description: Lamb Shoulder (gyro/shawarma base) — Price -7.5% vs baseline — primary protein cost driver

pulse_summary:

reviews.author: TerpFan2024
reviews.text: Best late-night spot near UMD. The gyro is massive and the staff is super fast after midnight.

reviews.author: UMD_Alumni_Fan
reviews.text: Been going here since 2019. Aarav is still there and still the fastest checkout on campus.

reviews.author: LateNightRegular
reviews.text: Open until 3 AM and quality stays consistent. Michael keeps the night crew sharp.

reviews.author: CollegeParkLocal
reviews.text: Love this place but Thursday nights around 11 PM there's always a huge wait. Need more staff then.
